identifiers.note: internal_id is the bdlaws database identifier, not the legal citation number

content_raw:
The Appropriation Ordinance, 1977 

                        
                        
                    
                    
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                        
                             (
                                
                                    
                                    
                                        
                                            Ordinance
                                            
                                        
                                        NO. XXI OF 1977
                                    
                                

                                )

An Ordinance to authorise expenditure of certain   sums from and out of the Consolidated Fund for the services of the financial year ending on the thirtieth day of June, 1978.

                                    
                                    
                                
                            
                        
                        
                            
                            
                                   	WHEREAS it is expedient to authorise expenditure of certain sums from and out of the Consolidated Fund for the services of the financial year ending on the thirtieth day of June, 1978;    	NOW, THEREFORE, in pursuance of the Proclamations of the 20th August, 1975, and the 8th  November, 1975, and in exercise of all powers enabling him in that behalf, the  President is pleased to make and promulgate the following Ordinance:-

An Ordinance to authorise expenditure of certain   sums from and out of the Consolidated Fund for the services of the financial year ending on the thirtieth day of June, 1978.

Short title
1. This Ordinance may be called the Appropriation Ordinance, 1977.

Issue of Taka 4312,30,23,000 out of the  Consolidated  Fund for the year 1977-78
2. There may be paid and applied from and out of the Consolidated Fund sums not exceeding those specified in column 3 of the Schedule amounting in the aggregate to the sum of Taka four thousand three hundred twelve crores, thirty lakhs and twenty-three thousand towards defraying several charges which will come in course of payment during the financial year ending on the thirtieth day of June, 1978, in respect of the services and purposes specified in column 2 of the Schedule.

Appropriation
3. The sums authorised to be paid and applied from and out of the Consolidated Fund by this Ordinance shall be appropriated for the services and purposes expressed in the Schedule in relation to the financial year ending on the thirtieth  day of June, 1978.

temporal_disclaimer: No inference of current legal force or applicability

lexical_references.disclaimer: Detected via pattern matching. No legal force or applicability implied.

data_quality.completeness_disclaimer: Website representation incomplete; legal completeness unknown
known_limitations: Gazette PDF comparison is out of scope
Preamble and enactment clause may not be present in all HTML extractions
Statutory footnotes may be incomplete or missing from source HTML
data_quality.ml_usage_warning: HTML artifacts, encoding noise, and structural gaps are present; suitable only for exploratory retrieval and analysis. Not validated for training or evaluation.

তফসিল.method: raw string frequency, including schedule references

content_raw_disclaimer: Represents browser-parsed DOM text via textContent, not raw HTML or server response bytes
reference_warning: Keywords detected in proximity to citation strings. No legal relationship, effect, direction, or applicability is implied.
numeric_warning: Numeric expressions may be incomplete or malformed due to HTML source limitations

can_trust: Text appeared on bdlaws HTML pages at extraction time
